project_summary: Requirements draft from 7 utterances (Client, PM) with 3 functional requirements, 1 non-functional requirements, 1 constraints, and 1 open questions.

functional_requirements.text: Our school clubs need an app to publish weekly meeting schedules.
Club leaders should create and update events.
Students should join events and receive reminder notifications.

non_functional_requirements.text: It should be easy to use for freshmen.

constraints.text: Only club leaders and the student council should cancel events.

assumptions.text: Maybe attendance analytics can be added later.

open_questions.text: Who is allowed to cancel events?

follow_up_questions: Can you clarify: Maybe attendance analytics can be added later?

question_decisions.text: Who is allowed to cancel events?
Maybe attendance analytics can be added later.
question_decisions.suggested_follow_up: Can you clarify: Maybe attendance analytics can be added later?
